findings.description: s4 consolidates at least 4 h3 subsections from the source (クラス図, 各クラスの責務, シーケンス図, テーブル定義の例) without splitting. The source 構成 h2 section exceeds 2000 chars of plain text (tables, class descriptions, sequence flow notes, table definitions) and contains multiple h3 headings, meeting the split-reporting threshold.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 headings under 構成: 概要図, クラス図, 各クラスの責務, インタフェース定義, クラス定義, シーケンス図, 全処理方式共通 (sequence), 画面オンライン, テーブル定義の例, リクエスト

findings.description: s5 consolidates h3 subsections (全処理方式共通 with XML examples, 設定内容詳細 with property tables for BasicServiceAvailability and ServiceAvailabilityCheckHandler) without splitting. The combined source content exceeds 2000 chars and has multiple h3 headings.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 headings under 設定の記述: 全処理方式共通, 設定内容詳細; h4: nablarch.core.web.service.BasicServiceAvailabilityクラスの設定, nablarch.common.handler.ServiceAvailabilityCheckHandlerの設定

findings.description: The hints for s3 omit '未検討' and '取り下げ', which are named subsection categories in the source. A user asking about unreviewed or withdrawn requirements would not find s3 via these terms.
findings.source_evidence: Source has '未検討' section listing 3 items (指定時間切り替え, 画面項目表示切り替え, 個別画面遷移) and '取り下げ' section listing withdrawal of function-level check with justification.
